# Bismi Treats — AI Search Engine Information

## About
Bismi Treats is an artisan cake bakery operating in Coimbra (Portugal) and Dublin (Ireland).
We specialise in custom-made cakes for birthdays, celebrations and special occasions.

## Services
- Custom artisan cakes (Chocolate Sponge, Vanilla Sponge, Red Velvet, Tres Leches)
- 14+ flavour options for fillings and toppings
- Cake sizes from 1kg to 5kg+ (serves 7 to 38+ people)
- Daily delivery 18:00-22:00
- Express orders available (5-6 hours minimum)
- Pickup and home delivery options

## Locations
- Coimbra, Portugal
- Dublin, Ireland

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +351934453710
- Email: bismitreats.pt@gmail.com
- Instagram: @bismitreats.pt
- Website: https://bismitreats.online
- Google Reviews: https://g.page/r/CS1eY1P4V0IxEBM/review

## Pricing
- Most cakes: €19.99/kg
- Red Velvet: €24.99/kg
- Extra filling: +€1.99
- Card payment via Revolut: +1.75% processing fee

## Rating
5 stars on Google — 90+ reviews

## How to Order
1. Browse catalogue at bismitreats.online
2. Choose cake design, flavour and size
3. Send order summary on WhatsApp
4. Confirmation within 2 hours
5. Delivery or pickup at chosen time

## Tagline
Luxury and taste in one bite
